statement.en: Multi-omic profiling of early pregnancy small and large plasma extracellular vesicles reveals placental, metabolic, and structural adaptation signatures
statement.summary: Supplementary tables and figures supporting the manuscript: "Multi-omic profiling of early pregnancy small and large plasma extracellular vesicles reveals placental, metabolic, and structural adaptation signatures"

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a supplementary data publication (2026-04-25) supporting an empirical multi-omic study. The core claims are observational/descriptive (EV profiling results) pending peer review validation. The manuscript appears recent and not yet formally published in primary venue; supplementary materials alone cannot establish truth-status without main paper acceptance.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 妊娠初期の小胞が時間とともに解き放つ多層的な調和が、適応の立方根として姿を現す。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 同心円の小胞層が母胎への適応信号をらせん状に放ち、代謝の脈動が時間を刻む。
